nasb.text: But they had no child, because Elizabeth was barren, and they were both advanced in years.

esv.text: But they had no child, because Elizabeth was barren, and both were advanced in years.

cnv.text: 只是沒有孩子，因為以利沙伯不生育，二人又都上了年紀。

ccb.text: 但他们没有孩子，因为伊丽莎白不能生育，二人又年纪老迈。

csbs.text: 可是他们没有孩子，因为伊莉莎白不能生育，两个人又都上了年纪。
